entities.name: CHICKPEA

entities.description: Annual wild species of the Cicer genus used for genetic improvement

entities.description: The concentration of protein within the seeds of Cicer species

entities.description: The concentration of Ca in the seeds

entities.description: The concentration of Mg in the seeds

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: A health condition resulting from protein and mineral deficiencies

entities.name: PROTEIN AND MINERAL DEFICIENCIES
entities.description: The lack of essential proteins and minerals in the diet

entities.description: A region where chickpea is an important staple grain legume

entities.description: A region where chickpea is an important staple grain legume

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The variation in genetic makeup for protein and mineral concentrations among accessions

entities.name: GENE POOL
entities.description: The primary, secondary, and tertiary groups of genetic resources in Cicer species

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of phenotypic variation in seed nutrients attributable to genetic factors

entities.name: CICER CHORASSANICUM
entities.description: A wild Cicer species promising for high seed protein and calcium

entities.name: CICER JUDAICUM
entities.description: A wild Cicer species promising for high seed iron, copper, and magnesium

entities.name: CICER YAMASHIATAE

entities.name: CICER PINNATIFIDUM
entities.description: A wild Cicer species promising for high seed manganese

entities.name: CICER ECHINOSPERMUM
entities.description: A wild Cicer species crossable with cultivated chickpea

entities.name: CICER RETICULATUM
entities.description: A wild Cicer species crossable with cultivated chickpea and promising for multiple nutrients

entities.name: CROSSING PROGRAM
entities.description: A breeding method used to develop new nutrient-rich cultivars

entities.name: NUTRIENT-RICH CULTIVARS
